title: intense post-workout venezuelan fenugreek tagine
description: a musky, cheesy, post-workout venezuelan dish featuring fenugreek, tagine-cooked to perfection. fenugreek's bitter flavor pairs surprisingly well with caracas cheese.

ingredients.name: feno
ingredients.notes: fresh fenugreek leaves, stems removed, chopped

ingredients.name: caracas cheese
ingredients.notes: or other strong, tangy cheese, shredded

instructions: heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or other large pot over medium-high heat.
add cumin, coriander, and red pepper. cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
add carrot and sweet potato. cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
add feno and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted, about 3 minutes.
add caracas cheese and stir until melted and the mixture is well combined.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
serve hot, garnished with additional feno if desired.
